content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA 
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
· 428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
January 8, 2016 
Steve Fischer 
City of Oxnard, Office of the City Attorney 
300 West Third Street, Suite 300 
Oxnard, CA 93030 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-15-224 
Dear Mr. Fischer: 
This is in regard to the November 12, 2015 letter submitted by Rahsaan J. Tilford requesting 
advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act. 
As you know, we have been in communication with Mr. Tilford and yourself seeking 
additional facts necessary in order to provide advice. We understand that you are still in the process 
of gathering additional infonnation. 
Since we have not yet received the additional facts, we are closing this 2015 advice letter 
number. Once you obtain the necessary facts, please feel free to resubmit the request and we will 
relog it in as a new request. 
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. 
1stant General Counsel 
JWW:jgl

sections.question_synthetic: The request sought advice under the Political Reform Act regarding an unspecified matter, but additional facts were required to provide guidance.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC is closing the 2015 advice letter number (W-15-224) without providing advice because necessary additional facts have not yet been received, and invites resubmission once the facts are gathered.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal/closure letter rather than a substantive advice letter. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. The document indicates the FPPC was still gathering facts and chose to close the file rather than provide advice.
